name: get_doctype_schema
description: Get cached DocType schema (fields, types, sample). Fetches from ERPNext on first access or when refresh=true, then stores in ~/.erpnext-mcp/doctypes/ for reuse. Prefer this over get_doctype_fields for query building.

doctype.description: ERPNext DocType (e.g., Sprint Backlogs, Leave Application)

refresh.description: If true, re-fetch from ERPNext and update cache (default: false)
